training_status: Locked in with diet, training and hormones

benefits.description: Extremely noticeable visceral fat loss at 2 IU HGH within a month; Reta resolved any water retention and further improved body composition
Face leaned out and looked about 10 years younger once induction water came off

side_effects.description: Water retention during HGH induction phase, held in chin area, described as subQ not intramuscular
Reta caused no water retention anywhere, leading to no pump and flat muscles

protocol_notes: Notes that water retention upon starting HGH or increasing dose typically lasts a couple of weeks but is variable. Emphasizes that being dialed in on diet, training, and hormones allows clear tracking of variables.
